13.gl: a good message, i.e. the gospel

22.gl: supreme in authority, i.e. (as noun) controller; by implication, Master (as a respectful title)

24.gl: to procreate (properly, of the father, but by extension of the mother); figuratively, to regenerate
24.kj: bear, beget, be born, bring forth, conceive, be delivered of, gender, make, spring

28.gl: blood, literally (of men or animals), figuratively (the juice of grapes) or specially (the atoning blood of Christ); by implication, bloodshed, also kindred

29.gl: properly, royalty, i.e. (abstractly) rule, or (concretely) a realm (literally or figuratively)

38.gl: breath, i.e. (by implication) spirit, abstractly or concretely (the animal sentient principle only; thus distinguished on the one hand from G4151 (πνεῦμα), which is the rational and immortal soul; and on the other from
38.kj: heart (+ -ily), life, mind, soul, + us, + you

flesh (as stripped of the skin), i.e. (strictly) the meat of an animal (as food), or (by extension) the body (as opposed to the soul (or spirit), or as the symbol of what is external, or as the means of kindred), or (by
41.dv: probably from the base of G4563 (σαρόω);

51.gl: a slave (literal or figurative, involuntary or voluntary; frequently, therefore in a qualified sense of subjection or subserviency)

59.gl: a witness (literally (judicially) or figuratively (genitive case)); by analogy, a "martyr"

61.gl: figuratively, a magistrate; by Hebraism, very
61.dv: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588 (ὁ)) the supreme Divinity;

62.gl: a witness (literally (judicially) or figuratively (genitive case)); by analogy, a "martyr"

63.gl: figuratively, a magistrate; by Hebraism, very
63.dv: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588 (ὁ)) the supreme Divinity;

63.gl: peace (literally or figuratively); by implication, prosperity
63.kj: one, peace, quietness, rest, + set at one again
63.dv: probably from a primary verb (to join);

64.gl: the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)
64.dv: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);

75.kj: account, cause, communication, X concerning, doctrine, fame, X have to do, intent, matter, mouth, preaching, question, reason, + reckon, remove, say(-ing), shew, X speaker, speech,
